title: orbexilum lupinellus
intro: Orbexilum lupinellus, also known as the fringed gentian, is a perennial plant species native to North America. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its bitter compounds, which have been traditionally used to treat digestive issues and stimulate appetite. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving liver function, due to its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties. Orbexilum lupinellus is often prepared as an herbal tea or tincture, and can also be used in combination with other herbs in traditional medicine.
